positive: A highly stylized, vector-art illustration of a majestic mythical creature, combining elements of a griffin and a celestial dolphin, leaping through a vibrant nebula. The creature should have clean, defined silhouettes and striking geometric patterns etched into its wings and hide. The composition is central and dynamic, with the nebula background rendered in deep indigo, cosmic purples, and glowing cyan accents. Use strong, contrasting colors and minimal gradients, optimizing for screen printing or apparel transfer. Style: Neo-geometric tribal fusion, inspired by Art Deco and cosmic watercolor. High contrast, perfect symmetry, ultra-detail, isolated on a clean background.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, photorealistic, 3d render, jpeg artifacts, grain, blur, dirty
